en: The teacher is here.

ab: Aka’avin tu kavivila, mucuqaisa ha’an pangka’ulungqu’ an su’u.
ch: B:不要再玩了，快坐在座位上。
en: Stop playing and quickly sit in your seat.
Sorry, I’m late!
Come in quickly.
What day is it today?

ab: Malkahima’ ca haip, namul’uu ca laqbing, muskun ata mudan kavila ti.
ch: B:今天星期五，明天放假，一起出去玩吧。
en: It’s Friday today, we have a day off tomorrow. Let’s go out and play together!

ab: Macial na, muskun ata munvaqlac ti.
en: Great! Let’s go to the riverside.
What day will it be tomorrow?

ab: Malkati’un ca laqbing, muskun ata laqbing qani’an kavila’ mali’ qa.
ch: B:明天星期三，我們明天下午去玩球吧。
en: Tomorrow will be Wednesday. Let’s go play ball tomorrow afternoon!
What will you be doing tomorrow morning?

ab: Ulu’an ca laqbing, namuskun azak tina nak munsumsuman.
ch: B:明天是星期日，我要和媽媽去教會。
en: Tomorrow will be Sunday, I will be going to church with my mom.
What’s wrong?

ab: Asa cak mutaq, namudan cak kilim i ’utaki’an.
en: I feel like vomiting. I need to go to the restroom.
I feel dizzy.
Lie down and rest.

ab: Tataqu, macakbit ca tian nak, asa kilim ’utaki’an.
ch: A:老師，我肚子痛，要去廁所。
en: Teacher, I have a stomachache. I need to go to the restroom.
Okay, go quickly.
May I go wash my hands?
It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.

ab: Tataqu, macakbit sala ca bungu, namuluu cak ca qani’anin.
ch: A:老師，我頭好痛，下午要請假。
en: It’s almost time for class to end. Wait a little longer.
Okay, take care and go home.

ab: Tataqu, namuluu cak ca muqnin malkac’an. maupa’i nasaduu cak ising.
ch: A:老師我下禮拜一要請假，我要去看醫生。
en: Teacher, I need to take a sick leave next Monday. I have to see a doctor.
Alright, take care of yourself.
Where is Ival?

ab: Han cia ’utaki’an, macakbit dau ca tian cia.
en: She has a stomachache. She’s in the restroom.
Where is Malan?

ab: Tataqu, macakbit ca qungqungan it Malan, muluu cia haip
en: Teacher, Malan has a sore throat. She took a sick leave today.

ab: Makua cuna uka’ at Kaut maipati?
en: Why didn’t Kaut come?
She has a fever.
